# TravelItinerary Card

## Summary
The `TravelItinerary` card is a specialized card for creating and managing travel itineraries. It allows users to define a trip title, destination, date range, and a list of itinerary stops with details like location, time, and category. The card also includes a QR code field for sharing the itinerary.

## Import
```javascript
import { TravelItinerary } from '../travel-itinerary';
```

## Usage as a Field
To use the `TravelItinerary` card as a field within a consuming card or field, you can include it as follows:

```javascript
import { CardDef, contains } from 'https://cardstack.com/base/card-api';
import { TravelItinerary } from '../travel-itinerary';

export class MyCard extends CardDef {
  @field travelItinerary = contains(TravelItinerary);
}
```

## Template Usage
To display the `TravelItinerary` card within a template, you can use the following markup:

```handlebars
<BoxelCard>
  <@fields.travelItinerary />
</BoxelCard>
```

This will render the `TravelItinerary` card inline within the consuming card.
